methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The contract must hold enough funding tokens to cover all user deposits before the pool is launched.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract balance is less than totalDeposits, users will not be able to claim their refunds if the pool is rejected or disqualified, leading to loss of user funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_funding_token_solvency() public view { if(poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LISTING || poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LAUNCH || poolStatus == PoolStatus.NOT_QUALIFIED || poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LAUNCH_DEPOSIT_DISABLED) { assert(IERC20(genesisInfo.fundingToken).balanceOf(address(this)) >= totalDeposits); } }

invariants.description: The contract must hold the proposed native token amount until the pool is launched or rejected.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the native token balance is less than proposedNativeAmount, the pool cannot be fully launched, or the token owner cannot be fully refunded upon rejection.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_native_token_solvency() public view { if(poolStatus == PoolStatus.NATIVE_TOKEN_DEPOSITED || poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LISTING || poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LAUNCH || poolStatus == PoolStatus.PRE_LAUNCH_DEPOSIT_DISABLED) { assert(IERC20(genesisInfo.nativeToken).balanceOf(address(this)) >= allocationInfo.proposedNativeAmount); } }

invariants.description: The sum of individual user deposits must exactly equal the totalDeposits state variable.
invariants.attack_scenario: If totalDeposits is manipulated to be less than the sum of user deposits, the calculated native token allocation will be incorrect, and users might receive fewer shares. If it's more, the contract might become insolvent.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_total_deposits_conservation() public view { uint256 sum = 0; for(uint i=0; i<depositers.length; i++) { sum += userDeposits[depositers[i]]; } assert(totalDeposits == sum); }

invariants.description: The total liquidity minted during launch must equal the sum of all user balances plus the token owner's unstaked amount.
invariants.attack_scenario: If this invariant is broken, users or the token owner could claim more liquidity than was actually minted, leading to a drain of the gauge or pair.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_liquidity_conservation() public view { if(liquidity > 0) { uint256 sum = 0; for(uint i=0; i<depositers.length; i++) { sum += this.balanceOf(depositers[i]); } if (userDeposits[genesisInfo.tokenOwner] == 0) { sum += this.balanceOf(genesisInfo.tokenOwner); } assert(sum + tokenOwnerUnstaked == liquidity); } }

invariants.description: The total supply of minted NFTs must never exceed the MAX_SUPPLY.
invariants.attack_scenario: If an attacker can bypass the supply check, they can inflate the NFT supply, diluting the value of existing NFTs and violating the promised scarcity.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_max_supply() public view { assert(totalSupply() <= MAX_SUPPLY); }

invariants.description: When a pool is partially launched, the refundable native amount must exactly equal the proposed amount minus the allocated amount.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the refundable amount is greater, the token owner can drain native tokens belonging to the liquidity pool. If less, the token owner loses funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_refundable_amount_consistency() public view { if(poolStatus == PoolStatus.PARTIALLY_LAUNCHED) { assert(allocationInfo.refundableNativeAmount == allocationInfo.proposedNativeAmount - allocationInfo.allocatedNativeAmount); } }

invariants.description: The allocated funding and native amounts must never exceed their respective proposed amounts.
invariants.attack_scenario: If allocations exceed proposed amounts, the pool would attempt to launch with more tokens than it holds, leading to transaction reverts and locked funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_allocation_bounds() public view { assert(allocationInfo.allocatedFundingAmount <= allocationInfo.proposedFundingAmount); assert(allocationInfo.allocatedNativeAmount <= allocationInfo.proposedNativeAmount); }
